description:
Implement `hx-spinner` (T1-26) ‚Äî 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Circular loading indicator for inline and overlay loading states.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/`:
- `index.ts` ‚Äî re-export
- `hx-spinner.ts` ‚Äî Lit component
- `hx-spinner.styles.ts` ‚Äî CSS with `--hx-*` tokens
- `hx-spinner.stories.ts` ‚Äî Storybook stories
- `hx-spinner.test.ts` ‚Äî Vitest tests

**Props:** `size` (sm/md/lg ‚Äî also accepts CSS size string like "3rem"), `variant` (`default`|`primary`|`inverted`)

**No slots** ‚Äî purely visual.

**CSS Parts:** `base` (SVG or CSS-only spinner element)

**ARIA:** Host gets `role="status"` and `aria-label="Loading"` (or custom via `label` prop). Visually-hidden text "Loading..." inside for screen readers. When used inside another component with a loading state, set `aria-hidden="true"` on the spinner since the parent announces the state.

**Implementation note:** Use CSS animation on an SVG `<circle>` with `stroke-dashoffset` animation, or a pure CSS rotating div ‚Äî whichever is more performant. Must respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass, axe-core zero violations, Storybook all sizes + variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-spinner ‚Äî T1-26 Loading Spinner
